LAW AND MOTION 302,PLAINTIFF MIDLAND FUNDING, LLC'S MOTION TO SET ASIDE AND VACATE JUDGMENT IS GRANTED. NO OPPOSITION FILED. THE DEFAULT AND DEFAULT JUDGMENT ARE SET ASIDE. PLAINTIFF MAY DISMISS THE CASE WITH PREJUDICE UPON ENTRY OF THIS ORDER. ORDER SIGNED. JUDGE: ERNEST H. GOLDSMITH; CLERK: CYNTHIA HERBERT; REPORTER: SHERYL L. SAWYER, CSR # 5976 =302/EHG

MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT/DEFAULT JUDGMENT/LEAVE TO DEFEND
Off Calendar Sep-09-2014 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling.
PLAINTIFF MIDLAND FUNDING, LLC'S MOTION TO SET ASIDE AND VACATE JUDGMENT is Granted. No opposition filed. The default and default judgment are set aside. Plaintiff may dismiss the case with prejudice upon entry of this order. ORDER SIGNED. Judge: Ernest H. Goldsmith; Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Reporter: Sheryl L. Sawyer, CSR # 5976 =302/eg
